audit_items.proof_trace: parseResetAndPosition contains zero free()/delete calls; all memory is managed via RAII (stack-local UnicodeString) and unowned const pointers. The property's UAF/double-free condition cannot arise because no pointer is ever freed inside this function. CollationBuilder::addReset (the sink implementation) only reads str by const reference and writes to its own internal node structures without touching the parser's object graph.
